framework.name: Anchoring Price Manipulation
framework.description: Strategic technique where initial price points dramatically influence perceived value of subsequent offers, regardless of actual worth.
framework.raw_quote: I want to sell you a car... Let's say you ask me what the price is and I tell you $30,000. Now, if you come back a week later and I say, 'I'll sell it to you for $20,000.' This seems like a new very cheap price to you
